input.assignment: New study: children near freight routes have higher respiratory illness and lower test scores than socioeconomic peers
input.timeline: 3 weeks to report, 6 weeks to publication
input.prior_knowledge: Know headline finding, haven't read full methodology

test_cases.notes: Story territory map correctly distinguishes established/contested/unknown. Three angles are genuinely distinct. Source list is ordered correctly — lead author first as the door-opener. Reporting order recommendation is strategically sound. Documents section is specific (EPA AirData portal named). Excellent brief.

input.assignment: A major city is planning to remove a historic public market to build a transit hub — the market has operated for 80 years and community groups are fighting the decision
input.prior_knowledge: Know the planning decision was announced last week; have contact for one of the community groups

test_cases.notes: Three angles (community loss story, planning process story, comparable cities story) are distinct and well-pitched. Documents section correctly identifies planning commission records, environmental assessment, and market financial records. Source list includes historical society as a less-obvious source. Reporting order accounts for the existing community contact.

input.assignment: Profile of a mid-career scientist who has pivoted from academic research to founding a startup in her field

test_cases.notes: Profile structure is correctly identified as requiring different angle logic than a reported story — brief adjusts appropriately. Three angles for the profile (the science angle, the career transition angle, the sector/industry angle) are all viable. Source list correctly identifies university colleagues and investors as supporting sources around the subject. Actionable for a 1-week timeline. Passes threshold.
